overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running along a tropical beach with turquoise water and ancient ruins. The character moves from shallow surf onto sand, passing a submerged roller coaster structure and an overgrown tower while heading toward a distant spire monument under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beach shoreline with shallow turquoise water

events.description: ocean wave splashes over the camera lens, temporarily obscuring the view
character transitions from running through shallow water onto dry sand

agents.ego_description: Aloy is running along the shoreline through shallow surf, heading toward a large ruined structure visible in the distance

entered.detail: clear turquoise shallow ocean with gentle waves lapping at the shore
white sand shoreline stretching along the water's edge
dense line of tall palm trees marking the edge of the beach forest
large rusted roller coaster structure partially submerged in the ocean

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy running through shallow turquoise water along a tropical beach. A wave splashes over the camera at 2.5 seconds, creating a brief water occlusion effect. The character then moves onto dry sand, with palm trees lining the left side and a massive roller coaster ruin visible ahead in the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with coastal ruins

agents.ego_description: continuing to run steadily along the beach, moving parallel to the shoreline with the roller coaster ruins now alongside on the right

entered.detail: tall ancient tower structure covered in vines and vegetation with wooden platforms

segments.scene_description: Aloy continues running along the white sand beach, passing the roller coaster structure which now sits to the right. The camera moves smoothly forward as a tall overgrown tower comes into view in the distance ahead, marking the next landmark along the coastline.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown ancient tower on rocky shoreline

events.description: ground surface changes from white sand to rocky gravel terrain
passing the large overgrown tower structure on the left side

agents.ego_description: running past the tall overgrown tower, transitioning from sandy beach to rocky ground while maintaining pace along the shoreline

entered.detail: tall thin spire monument visible in the distance across the water
gravel and rock-strewn beach replacing the white sand

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts from sand to rocky gravel as Aloy approaches and passes the massive overgrown tower with its vine-covered platforms. The distant spire becomes visible across the water, and the roller coaster structure disappears behind as the character moves past it along the increasingly rugged coastline.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coast with distant ruins and spire monument

events.description: view opens to reveal extensive ancient ruins across the water on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the rocky shoreline with the tall spire monument prominent in the distance, approaching ancient ruins visible across the water

entered.detail: extensive ruined structures and buildings visible across the water

segments.scene_description: Aloy runs along the rocky shoreline as the view opens up to reveal extensive ancient ruins across the water. The tall spire monument remains visible in the distance to the left while the overgrown tower and palm trees fall behind. The terrain remains rocky gravel as the character continues exploring the tropical coast.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a tropical coastline that transforms from a shallow surf into a rugged, ruin-strewn landscape. It begins with Aloy running through turquoise water, where a splashing wave briefly occludes the view before the camera emerges onto dry white sand lined with palm trees. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts past a massive submerged roller coaster ruin to reveal a tall, overgrown tower looming ahead. The terrain then transitions from soft sand to rocky gravel as the camera passes the vine-covered platforms of the tower, leaving the roller coaster behind. Finally, the view opens up across the water to reveal extensive ancient ruins and a distant spire monument as the character continues along the increasingly rugged shoreline.
